# 💫 About Me:
🔭 I'm currently working on my freelance consulting business where I take on short-term Software Engineering, DevOps, Cloud, & IT projects as my schedule allows, while I look for my next long-term project.<br>🌱 I'm currently learning more Azure, Terraform, Python, NodeJS, AWS, React, & content/marketing strategy.<br>💬 Ask me about cloud, full-stack software development, software testing/DevOps best practices, AI, & serverless.
